key_entities: criteria routing keys (api-compat, db-migrations, deletion-impact, tests, scope-intent)
propositions: Flip only the security criterion to blocking_enabled: true at the derived block_threshold, keeping all other LLM criteria advisory at 0.95.
Preserve the invariant that only DET criteria (secret-detection, high-critical-security) plus security are hard-blocks, with no other criterion blocking.
Update all three blocking-set pinning tests to assert the approved set {secret-detection, high-critical-security, security} and confirm deletion-impact stays non-blocking.
Add a dated enablement note to ADR 0036 concluding the permissive rollout for the security criterion, citing derivation ticket 9f25.
Provide a self-contained replay test proving #518-class importlib code-execution security findings now block while NIT findings yield zero false-blocks.
Restrict change to threshold/posture config only, with no decide.py math changes, and defer any expansion beyond security to 9f25's adjudication data.
